data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Adobe's platform uses microservices architecture to allow for independent deployments and service scaling.

data.title: Cloud-Native Infrastructure
data.description: Fully utilizes cloud services to ensure redundancy, availability, and manageability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN) Utilization
data.description: CDN is employed to ensure fast delivery of content across various geographies.

data.title: Monolithic to Microservices Transition
data.description: Transitioning from a monolithic architecture to microservices to enhance flexibility and scalability.

data.title: Data-Driven Systems
data.description: Employs data lakes and analytic tools to handle vast amounts of user and system data.
data.technical_spec: Apache Hadoop, Spark, big data frameworks
